title: Ḑank Heat Wave
lead: Ḑank is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.09. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ḑank is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 12%, and the wind speed is moderate at 5.4 km/h. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the critical heat wave situation in Ḑank.
